title: tabernaemontana glandulosa
intro: Tabernaemontana glandulosa, also known as the Yellow Trumpet Vine, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana glandulosa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
